mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, doctor_id, hospital_id, patient_name, patient_phone, patient_id_card, patient_gender, patient_age, appointment_date, appointment_time, disease_desc, amount, status, pay_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from t_appointment order by id desc
mapper.update: update t_appointment set order_no = #{et.orderNo}, user_id = #{et.userId}, doctor_id = #{et.doctorId}, hospital_id = #{et.hospitalId}, patient_name = #{et.patientName}, patient_phone = #{et.patientPhone}, patient_id_card = #{et.patientIdCard}, patient_gender = #{et.patientGender}, patient_age = #{et.patientAge}, appointment_date = #{et.appointmentDate}, appointment_time = #{et.appointmentTime}, disease_desc = #{et.diseaseDesc}, amount = #{et.amount}, status = #{et.status}, pay_time = #{et.payTime}, create_time = #{et.createTime}, update_time = #{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
